title: tragacantha lepidantha
intro: Tragacantha lepidantha, also known as the spiny gorse or gorse thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also rich in vitamins and minerals, providing various health benefits such as boosting the immune system and aiding in digestion. Tragacantha lepidantha is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
